AI-Accelerated Software Engineering about

About

Hi, I’m Safraz Razik — founder of Zetmel, an AI-accelerated software engineering studio.

I’m a software professional with 15+ years in full-stack development, project leadership, and startup co-founding. My expertise spans modern JavaScript frameworks (React, Vue, TypeScript, Next.js), backend systems (Node.js, PHP, Python), and enterprise platforms like Oracle Commerce Cloud and Oracle Storefront Framework.

What sets my work apart today is the integration of AI into the engineering process. I run local LLM environments (Ollama, OpenCode, Claude Code), evaluate coding models (Qwen, Llama, DeepSeek) for code quality and task fit, and use structured prompting and context-management workflows to coordinate multi-stage development — all while maintaining production standards through technical audits and recovery sprints.

I’ve delivered solutions at Fortune 500 companies (Motorola Solutions) and startups alike, co-founded ventures, built open-source tools (Vue File Agent, Rockplate), and contributed to projects across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
